title: BoardGameGeek Hotness
content:
1. **Lands of Evershade**
*2026*
 Hybrid RPG/board game combines storytelling, tactical combat, and dice-based system.
![Lands of Evershade](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-06/toplist/bgg_b253ea6c.png)

2. **Dark Pact**
*2026*
Be the first occultist to build a deck to fulfill one of thirteen unique Dark Pacts.
![Dark Pact](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-06/toplist/bgg_c1db16b0.jpg)

3. **Rolling Deep**
*2027*
Journey to the Center of the Earth in this Balatro-inspired roguelike dice game.
![Rolling Deep](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-06/toplist/bgg_b90eb787.jpg)

4. **Eternal Decks**
*2025*
Can you solve each stage before your deck runs out?
![Eternal Decks](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-06/toplist/bgg_ad0b4179.png)

5. **World Order**
*2026*
Simulate the modern global political system in this area-control game.
![World Order](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-06/toplist/bgg_59b354f5.jpg)

6. **Nippon: Zaibatsu**
*2026*
Control conglomerates of companies driving Japan’s economy.
![Nippon: Zaibatsu](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-06/toplist/bgg_fa85070f.jpg)

7. **The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship**
*2025*
As members of The Fellowship, embark on a journey to save—or doom—Middle-earth.
![The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-06/toplist/bgg_89ff2906.png)

8. **Magical Athlete**
*2025*
Pit a cast of crazy characters against each other in a madcap race to the finish.
![Magical Athlete](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-06/toplist/bgg_278db97f.png)

9. **SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence**
*2024*
Search for signs of alien life by launching probes and analyzing distant signals.
![SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-06/toplist/bgg_cab87e6c.jpg)

10. **Inkwell**
*2026*
Complete illustrations or claim new manuscript pages as you impress the abbot.
![Inkwell](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-06/toplist/bgg_1c4e8114.png)

11. **Ark Nova**
*2021*
Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects.
![Ark Nova](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-06/toplist/bgg_59bebc71.jpg)

12. **Lairs**
*2026*
Build a devious dungeon and explore your rival's creation. 
![Lairs](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-06/toplist/bgg_542406f9.jpg)

13. **Heat: Pedal to the Metal**
*2022*
Push your car to the limit in the pursuit of victory, but don’t overheat!
![Heat: Pedal to the Metal](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-06/toplist/bgg_5fa41e93.jpg)

14. **Race for the Galaxy: Xeno Counterstrike**
*2026*
Strike back at the Xeno home systems.
![Race for the Galaxy: Xeno Counterstrike](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-06/toplist/bgg_d0d5de03.jpg)

15. **Feya's Swamp**
*2025*
Rise as the most prosperous clan in this magical swamp.
![Feya's Swamp](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-06/toplist/bgg_ae6d66c0.png)

16. **Compania**
*2025*
Grow your fledgling company to become the richest in the world of Factoria.
![Compania](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-06/toplist/bgg_16dfbaf1.png)

17. **Flockers**
*2026*
Fly your flock of snow geese southward in this tactical card game.
![Flockers](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-06/toplist/bgg_164c5507.jpg)

18. **Race for the Galaxy**
*2007*
Worlds await! Colonize, develop and conquer, taking advantage of others' choices.
![Race for the Galaxy](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-06/toplist/bgg_8afa9414.jpg)

19. **Spirit Island**
*2017*
Island Spirits join forces using elemental powers to defend their home from invaders.
![Spirit Island](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-06/toplist/bgg_a3d83309.jpg)

20. **Terraforming Mars**
*2016*
Compete with rival CEOs to make Mars habitable and build your corporate empire.
![Terraforming Mars](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-06/toplist/bgg_8bb8942c.jpg)

21. **Brass: Birmingham**
*2018*
Build networks, grow industries, and navigate the world of the Industrial Revolution.
![Brass: Birmingham](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-06/toplist/bgg_2196bdfb.jpg)

22. **Arcs**
*2024*
Rule the galaxy with your court, fleet, and cities.
![Arcs](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-06/toplist/bgg_07a9d342.png)

23. **Obsession**
*2018*
Renovate an estate, manage servants, and pursue romance in Victorian England.
![Obsession](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-06/toplist/bgg_d61a85c2.png)

24. **Bailiff of Boscoop**
*2026*
Rise to prominence as the founder of a village, as a judge, or as a duck dealer.
![Bailiff of Boscoop](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-06/toplist/bgg_9881e599.png)

25. **Harmonies**
*2024*
Create your own landscape and habitats to welcome animals.
![Harmonies](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-06/toplist/bgg_49cec2d4.jpg)
author: boardgamegeek.com

title: BoardGameGeek Bestsellers (Fallback to Plays)
content:
1. **Flip 7**
*16 months on the list*
Score the cards in front of you, or take another card, risking everything you hold?
![Flip 7](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-06/toplist/bgg_17266ea1.jpg)

2. **Harmonies**
*24 months on the list*
Create your own landscape and habitats to welcome animals.
![Harmonies](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-06/toplist/bgg_14225364.jpg)

3. **Ark Nova**
*52 months on the list*

![Ark Nova](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-06/toplist/bgg_bc52e115.jpg)

4. **Castle Combo**
*19 months on the list*
Combine medieval villagers and castle dwellers to score points.
![Castle Combo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-06/toplist/bgg_f1596618.jpg)

5. **Wingspan**
*88 months on the list*
Attract a beautiful and diverse collection of birds to your wildlife preserve.
![Wingspan](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-06/toplist/bgg_d7a4ddfc.jpg)

6. **Bomb Busters**
*12 months on the list*
Players defuse bombs by deducing and cutting unseen wires of different values.
![Bomb Busters](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-06/toplist/bgg_9c7a9f75.png)

7. **Azul**
*102 months on the list*

10. **Sea Salt & Paper**
*34 months on the list*
A few delicate Origami-style illustrations and a whole marine universe comes to life!
![Sea Salt & Paper](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-06/toplist/bgg_d297ad55.jpg)

11. **Forest Shuffle**
*31 months on the list*
Curate a diverse ecology with strategic flora and fauna, winter is coming!
![Forest Shuffle](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-06/toplist/bgg_3a2b50a2.jpg)

12. **Cascadia**
*57 months on the list*
Create the most harmonious ecosystem as you puzzle together habitats and wildlife.
![Cascadia](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-06/toplist/bgg_3c5ff19c.jpg)

13. **Hot Streak**
*3 months on the list*
Which mascot will cross the finish line first? Who will be DQ'd?
![Hot Streak](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-06/toplist/bgg_aa4f6c23.jpg)

14. **Faraway**
*24 months on the list*
Explore a mysterious land and fulfill quests on your way back.
![Faraway](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-06/toplist/bgg_c439d974.png)

15. **SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence**
*17 months on the list*
Search for signs of alien life by launching probes and analyzing distant signals.
![SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-06/toplist/bgg_5567934f.jpg)

16. **Sky Team**
*31 months on the list*
Work together silently to land a plane under increasingly challenging circumstances.

17. **Lost Ruins of Arnak**
*64 months on the list*
Explore an island to find resources and discover the lost ruins of Arnak.
![Lost Ruins of Arnak](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-06/toplist/bgg_a3293f07.jpg)

Pit a cast of crazy characters against each other in a madcap race to the finish.

*144 months on the list*

![Splendor](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-06/toplist/bgg_d18de517.jpg)
